_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic Patterns of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor (MPNST) Evolution Correlate with Clinical Outcome and Are Detectable in Cell-Free DNA.

_contextSnippet: we detected copy-number aberrations recurrently found in MPNSTs, including loss of chromosomes 1p, 5q, 4q, and 22, and chromosome 8 amplification
details: Successfully detected copy-number aberrations in cell-free DNA from 14 patients with NF1-related MPNST, including loss of chromosomes 1p, 5q, 4q, and 22, and chromosome 8 amplification
